Collection 10

Early Works

“Every mature style begins with the courage to experiment.”

The Early Works of contemporary artist Nona Dronova document the artist’s creative journey toward a distinctive artistic language. They reveal the gradual transformation of style, colour and composition, illustrating how experimentation, observation and continuous practice shaped the foundations of her mature artistic vision.
